addresses.description: Addresses that are eligible to sign the consumption of this output.

consumedOnChainId.description: Blockchain ID on which this output is consumed on.

consumingTxHash.description: Transaction ID that consumed this output.

createdOnChainId.description: Blockchain ID on which this output is created on.

consumingTxTimestamp.description: Unix timestamp in seconds at which this output was consumed.

creationTxHash.description: Transaction ID that created this output.

credentials.description: Credentials that signed the transaction to consume this utxo

groupId.description: Index representing the minting set for the NFT mint output.

locktime.description: Locktime in seconds after which this output can be consumed.

outputIndex.description: Postion of this output in a list of lexiographically sorted outputs of a transaction.

payload.description: Hex encoded data for NFT assets.

threshold.description: Minimum number of signatures required to consume this output.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in seconds at which this outptut was created.
